blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,258 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
